title: Choose Instructions, Skills, Plugins, Hooks, or MCP · Threat Case: Agents Guidance
summary: Route recurring agent needs to the smallest durable extension surface. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext agents guidance increment in an extension-surface decision matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.
Separate one-turn prompts, repository instructions, reusable skills, enforcement hooks, plugins, and external tools by scope.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
